who: finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For finance managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate procurement spend data aggregation instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to efficiently track budget variances leads to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance managers
Indie Hackers discussions on finance workflows
DM outreach to finance managers with demo video
Community forums for finance tools discussions
try_it: Let users try monthly budget variance report generation and data aggregation from multiple sources on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
